title: Subagent Telemetry, Contention Detection, and Shared File Protocol
dependencies: runtime changes to task tool, coordination store, and tool execution layer

features.title: Real background task visibility in task_board
features.problem: task_board only shows knowledge graph entries from log_activity calls. Actual background task() invocations are invisible — orchestrator cannot see which subagents are running, completed, or failed without waiting for notifications.
features.solution: task_board queries the subagent runtime for all active/completed tasks. Each row shows: lane_id, role (cartographer/architect/executor/etc), task_id, status, elapsed_seconds, last_heartbeat_seconds_ago. Optional per-lane timeline showing all tasks in lifecycle order.
runtime_changes_needed: task() calls must register task metadata (lane, role, plan_id) into coordination store at spawn time
task_board tool must query coordination store for active tasks instead of only knowledge graph
task completion must emit coord.task.completed event with result summary
task failure must emit coord.task.failed event with error context

features.title: Subagent progress streaming (heartbeat log)
features.problem: Long-running subagents (executors, validators) provide zero intermediate output. Orchestrator cannot distinguish between 'thinking', 'stuck', or 'silently failed'. Results in wasted turns and late repair cycles.
features.solution: Three-signal telemetry per subagent, emitted automatically by tool interceptors, not by subagent code: (1) Phase transitions at tool boundaries (preflight→reading→applying→typechecking→done), (2) Stuck detection (>60s in same phase triggers warning, >120s triggers kill+retry), (3) Error pre-echo — typecheck/validation failures emitted immediately, not buried in final handoff.
runtime_changes_needed: Tool execution layer emits coord.subagent.phase event on each tool call boundary
Each phase event includes: task_id, phase_name, target_file_or_fix, elapsed_in_phase_s
Stuck detection is server-side: if no phase event received in 60s, emit coord.subagent.stuck warning
Auto-retry: if stuck >120s, kill task and re-spawn with retry=true flag
typecheck/test tool failures emit coord.subagent.error_precho immediately

features.title: Auto-contention detection for shared files
features.problem: Orchestrator must manually remember which lanes touch which shared files (e.g., ipc.ts touched by 5 lanes). produce_fragment protocol works but requires orchestator to set it up explicitly. Missed contention = merge conflicts.
features.solution: When task() is called, system checks all files_modified claims against ALL running tasks' files_modified claims. If overlap detected: (1) Injects shared_file_warnings into BOTH prompts, (2) Auto-switches to produce_fragment mode for contested files, (3) Schedules consolidator task to run after all fragments arrive.
runtime_changes_needed: task() tool accepts optional files_modified list at spawn time
Coordination store maintains running claims registry: {task_id, files_modified[], lane_id}
On new task spawn, intersection check against all active claims
If overlap: auto-inject fragment instructions into prompt, emit coord.file.contention event
On last fragment arrival: auto-launch consolidator task, gate on typecheck

features.title: Consolidator — ordered fragment merge with typecheck gate
features.problem: Current produce_fragment sends raw content with ambiguous anchor_hint strings. Consolidation is manual. No typecheck gate on merged result.
features.solution: Fragment format changes to use explicit line anchors (after_line N or search/replace). Consolidator applies fragments in declared dependency order, detects overlapping hunks, runs typecheck on merged result. On typecheck failure, rolls back and reports exact conflict.
runtime_changes_needed: New consolidate CLI tool or tool function
Fragment schema change: after_line: number | search: string | replace: string (not raw content blob)
Dependency ordering: each fragment declares dependencies on other lanes' fragments
Typecheck gate: post-merge bun typecheck, rollback on failure

features.title: Consolidated session diff artifact
features.problem: At session end, orchestrator needs net line counts, per-package breakdown, test growth numbers for PR descriptions. Currently must grep and count manually.
features.solution: generate_report tool computes: files_changed, files_new, files_deleted, net_lines per package, test_growth count. Outputs structured JSON usable in PR body.
runtime_changes_needed: git diff --stat parsed at session end
Test file counting (grep for 'test(' or 'it(' in test files)
Per-package breakdown from file paths

features.title: Persistent lessons register
features.problem: Orchestrator learns codebase patterns every session but forgets between sessions. Same over-scoping mistake can repeat.
features.solution: Append-only JSONL lessons register. Each lesson: pattern, lesson_text, source_session, confidence. Injected into orchestrator system prompt on session start. Queriable via discover_findings.
runtime_changes_needed: New tool: learn_lesson(pattern, lesson, confidence)
Registration at session init: lessons with confidence >0.8 injected into context
Queryable via discover_findings with profile='lessons'

session_note: These were identified as the top friction points during the 9-lane Phase 2 follow-up session. Items marked 'needs runtime' cannot be fixed in agent-space — they require changes to the task tool, coordination store, and tool execution layer in this repo.
